task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop interface is visible, and 'Sample Order Lines' appears in the Data Elements panel on the left.

task_completion.description: Verify a Combo chart visualization is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization canvas shows a chart with both bars and a line, or the visualization type icon in the top-left of the Grammar panel indicates a 'Combo' chart.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Product Sub Category' is on the category axis and 'Sales' is the bar measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Grammar panel, 'Product Sub Category' (note: may appear without a hyphen) is placed in the Category (X-axis) section, and 'Sales' is placed in the Bar (Y-axis) section.

task_completion.description: Verify the running total of 'Sales' is configured as the line measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Grammar panel, a second 'Sales' measure or a calculation is placed in the Line (Y-axis) section, and there is an indication (like a delta symbol, 'Runningsum', or 'Running') that a cumulative/running total calculation is applied to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization is sorted by sales in descending order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bars in the chart are ordered from highest on the left to lowest on the right, or the sort configuration at the bottom of the Grammar panel shows 'Sales' with a downward arrow (descending).

task_completion.description: Verify the chart title is 'Pareto Analysis of Sub-Categories'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title displayed directly above the chart canvas or in the Properties panel under the Title section reads exactly 'Pareto Analysis of Sub-Categories'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Pareto_Analysis.dva' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box is visible showing the 'Documents' folder selected and 'Pareto_Analysis' in the filename field, or the main application window title bar displays 'Pareto_Analysis'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with the Oracle Analytics UI, such as dragging and dropping columns into the Grammar panel or clicking through menus.

integrity.description: Verify the visualization was built progressively rather than loaded from a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple screenshots show the step-by-step construction of the chart (e.g., an empty canvas, then bars added, then the line added, then sorted).

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window has the standard Oracle Analytics Desktop layout, icons, and styling, and is not a mock-up in a web browser or a different BI tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct column name in the dataset is 'Product Sub Category' (without a hyphen), despite the prompt's spelling. The chart must be a combo/dual chart. The sort order must be explicitly descending (bars going from highest to lowest). The line measure must be a running total (cumulative sum) of Sales. The expected title is 'Pareto Analysis of Sub-Categories'. The final file must be saved as 'Pareto_Analysis.dva'.
